name: RGB Platform
short_description: RGB Platform is a Metroidvania focused on pure platforming action — move, jump, dash, and attack. Explore the interior of a massive robot, switch between three characters with unique abilities, collect every hidden alphabet, and escape.
detailed_description:
RGB Platform is a metroidvania focused on pure platform action — movement, jumping, dashing, and attacking.

Explore the interior of a giant robot and use three distinct characters to collect hidden alphabets and escape.

Each character comes with a unique directional constraint.
Red can only dash and attack to the left, Green upward, and Blue to the right.
These limitations are not just differences in ability — they fundamentally change how you interpret and navigate space.

Players will encounter doors and puzzles that can only be cleared while keeping a character in a “locked” state.
Instead of gaining new abilities, you must carve your path forward by working within strict limitations.

All areas are designed for a dense, tightly crafted experience that can be completed in under two hours.
Mastery of movement and route planning becomes the key to overcoming challenges in this pure action-focused adventure.

The game contains no dialogue or language-dependent text, allowing players from any country to enjoy the same seamless experience without localization barriers.
